    rcases lt_trichotomy j k with h1 | h1 | h1
    · exfalso; exact hii k j ⟨j.pos, h1⟩ h.symm
    · exact h1
    · exfalso; exact hii j k ⟨k.pos, h1⟩ h
  let R (n : ℕ+) := (Finset.Icc 1 n).filter (fun j => f j > n)
  have R_card_mono (n : ℕ+) : (R n).card ≤ (R (n + 1)).card := by
    let S_n := (Finset.Icc 1 n).map ⟨f, f_inj⟩
    have h1 : (R n).card = n - (S_n.filter (· ≤ (n : ℤ))).card := by
      simp [R, S_n, Finset.card_filter]; rw [← Finset.card_map]; rfl
    have h2 : (R (n + 1)).card = (n + 1) - (S_n.filter (· ≤ (n + 1 : ℤ))).card - if f (n + 1) ≤ n + 1 then 1 else 0 := by
      simp [R, Finset.card_filter, S_n]; rw [Finset.Icc_succ_top, Finset.filter_insert]
      split_ifs <;> simp [Finset.card_map]
    by_cases h : f (n + 1) ≤ n + 1 <;> linarith [Finset.card_filter_le (S_n) (· ≤ (n + 1 : ℤ))]
  have R_card_bound (n : ℕ+) : (R n).card ≤ 2015 := by
    have : R n ⊆ Finset.Icc (if (n : ℤ) - 2014 > 1 then ((n : ℤ) - 2014).toNat else 1) n := by
      intro j hj; simp at hj; simp [hj.1]; linarith [hi j]
    exact (Finset.card_le_card this).trans (by simp; split_ifs <;> linarith)
  obtain ⟨b_val, N, hN⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_of_mono_bounded R_card_mono R_card_bound
  let b : ℕ+ := ⟨b_val, by linarith [R_card_mono 1, show 1 ≤ (R 1).card by simp [R, f, hi]]⟩
  let H (n : ℕ+) := ∑ j in R n, (f j - n)
  have h_step (n : ℕ+) (hn : n ≥ N) : H (n + 1) = H n + a (n + 1) - b := by
    have h_in_range : ∃ k ≤ n, f k = n + 1 := by
      have : (R (n + 1)).card = (R n).card := by rw [hN n hn, hN (n + 1) (by linarith)]
      contrapose! this; have : (R (n + 1)).card = (R n).card + 1 := by
        simp [R, Finset.Icc_succ_top, Finset.filter_insert, this]; simp [f]; linarith [hi (n + 1)]
      linarith
    rcases h_in_range with ⟨k0, hk0, hfk0⟩
    have hR : R n = insert k0 (R (n + 1)).filter (· ≤ n) := by
      ext j; simp [R, hfk0]; rcases eq_or_ne j k0 with rfl | hj
      · simp [hk0]; linarith
      · constructor <;> intro hj2 <;> simp [hj2] at * <;> try linarith
        cases' hj2.2 with hj2 hj2 <;> simp [hj2] at *; exfalso; exact hj (f_inj (by simp [hfk0, hj2]))
    simp [H, hR, b, ← hN n hn, Finset.sum_insert (by simp [R, hfk0, hk0]), hfk0, R, Finset.Icc_succ_top, Finset.filter_insert]
    have : f (n + 1) > n + 1 := by simp [f]; linarith [hi (n+1)]
    simp [this, add_comm]; abel
  exists b, N; intro m n h; rcases h with ⟨hmn, hNm⟩
  have : ∑ j in Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (a j - b) = H n - H m := by
    let n_val := (n : ℕ); let m_val := (m : ℕ)
    have : n_val = m_val + (n_val - m_val) := by linarith
    induction' (n_val - m_val) with k ih
    · linarith
    · rcases k with rfl | k
      · have : n = m + 1 := by ext; linarith
        simp [this, h_step m hNm]
      · have : m + k + 1 < n := by linarith
        rw [Finset.Icc_succ_top (by linarith), Finset.sum_insert (by simp; linarith), ih (by linarith)]
        have : n = (n - 1 : ℕ+) + 1 := by ext; simp; linarith
        rw [this, h_step (n - 1) (by linarith), this]; abel
  rw [this]; let X n := (R n).image (fun j => f j - n)
  have hXn (k : ℕ+) (hk : k ≥ N) : (X k).card = b ∧ (1 : ℤ) ∈ X k ∧ ∀ x ∈ X k, 1 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 2015 := by
    have h1 : (X k).card = b := by rw [Finset.card_image_of_injective _ (fun _ _ h => f_inj (by linarith)), hN k hk]
    have h2 : (1 : ℤ) ∈ X k := by
      obtain ⟨j, hj, hf⟩ : ∃ j ≤ k, f j = k + 1 := by
        have : g (k + 1) = g k := by rw [hN k hk, hN (k + 1) (by linarith)]
        contrapose! this; have : g (k + 1) = g k + 1 := by
          simp [g, R, Finset.Icc_succ_top, Finset.filter_insert, this]; simp [f]; linarith [hi (k + 1)]
        linarith
      simp [X]; exists j; simp [R, hj, hf]
    exact ⟨h1, h2, fun x hx => by rcases Finset.mem_image.1 hx with ⟨j, hj, rfl⟩; simp at hj; constructor <;> linarith [hi j]⟩
  have hH_bound {k} (hk : k ≥ N) : (b * (b + 1) / 2 : ℤ) ≤ H k ∧ H k ≤ 1 + (b - 1) * (4032 - b) / 2 := by
    let Xk := X k; have h := hXn k hk; simp [H, X] at *
    have : H k = ∑ x in Xk, x := by rw [Finset.sum_image (fun _ _ _ _ h => f_inj (by linarith))]
    constructor <;> rw [this]
    · exact Finset.sum_le_card_nsmul (Xk) _ _ (fun x hx => (h.2.2 x hx).1) |> (fun _ => Finset.sum_nat_range_le_sum_of_card_eq (Xk) b h.1)
    · have h_rem : (Xk.erase 1).card = b - 1 := by rw [Finset.card_erase_of_mem h.2.1, h.1]; rfl
      rw [Finset.sum_eq_sum_diff_singleton h.2.1, Finset.card_erase_of_mem h.2.1]
      have : ∀ x ∈ Xk.erase 1, x ≤ 2015 := fun x hx => (h.2.2 x (Finset.mem_of_mem_erase hx)).2
      linarith [Finset.sum_le_card_nsmul (Xk.erase 1) _ 2015 this, h_rem]
  have h_diff : (b - 1) * (2015 - b) ≤ 1007 ^ 2 := by
    let b' := (b : ℤ); have : (b' - 1) * (2015 - b') = - (b' - 1008) ^ 2 + 1007 ^ 2 := by ring
    rw [this]; linarith [sq_nonneg (b' - 1008)]
  have : abs (H n - H m) ≤ (b - 1) * (2015 - b) := by
    have h1 := hH_bound (hNm.trans hmn.le); have h2 := hH_bound hNm
    rw [abs_le]; constructor <;> linarith
  exact this.trans (by exact_mod_cast h_diff)
